full_name: Aluminum Alloy, Plate, 6.2Zn-2.3Cu-2.3Mg-0.12Zr (7050-T7451), Solution Heat Treated, Stress Relieved, and Overaged
version_year: see SAE catalog for current revision
scope: Covers 7050 aluminum alloy plate in the -T7451 temper (solution heat treated, stress relieved by stretching, and overaged) for aerospace structural applications, particularly thick sections such as bulkheads, wing spars, and fuselage frames. The T7451 temper trades a small strength reduction for improved resistance to stress-corrosion cracking and exfoliation.

mechanical_properties.note: T7451 plate, longitudinal, by thickness range. Strengths in ksi, elongation in 2 in.

license_note: Composition and typical T7451 mechanical properties compiled from freely published aerospace aluminum mill/distributor datasheets citing AMS 4050 (7050-T7451); no paywalled SAE text reproduced.
